note: TimescaleDB has significantly more rows due to seeded test data from MVP2. Delta comparison should focus on Flink dual-sink data (tenant: dual-sink-*, load-test*) where both sinks receive identical events.
delta_check_query_ch: SELECT count() FROM analytics.esg_readings WHERE tenant_id IN ('dual-sink-1778578955', 'dual-sink-test', 'tenant-1', 'tenant-2')
delta_check_query_ts: SELECT count(*) FROM esg.clean_metrics WHERE tenant_id IN ('dual-sink-1778578955', 'dual-sink-test', 'tenant-1', 'tenant-2')
